alt: Wandering albatross coasting beautifully just inches above the turbulent ocean swell
caption: They masterfully utilize dynamic soaring, extracting energy from wind shear boundaries above ocean waves to travel incredible distances virtually effortlessly.
acquisitionNotes: Curated fun-fact dynamic soaring behavior image. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/a/aa/Diomedea_exulans_-_SE_Tasmania.jpg
